title: Arm wrestling club to launch in George
description: GEORGE NEWS - An arm wrestling club will officially open in George on Saturday 28 February. The High Rollers Arm Wrestling Club will be launched at Tiger s Milk at 23 Courtenay Street, starting
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - An arm wrestling club will officially open in George on Saturday 28 February.

The High Rollers Arm Wrestling Club will be launched at Tiger's Milk at 23 Courtenay Street, starting at 11:00.

The club was founded this month and aims to grow the sport of arm wrestling in the Garden Route.

According to one of the organisers, Willem Otto, the opening day promises to be action-packed.

There will be lucky draws and an opportunity for spectators and potential members to experience the sport up close.

Read more about:
